title: Fix blank fullscreen PDF viewer mount timing (dbg97)
description:
Opening a PDF from the Plan View explorer into fullscreen showed a blank black area and a false "no pages" toast even though 17 pages were loaded. The continuous PDF viewer was mounting while the fullscreen host was still 1×1 pixels (before flex layout finished).

dbg97 waits for the fullscreen PDF host to reach real dimensions, scopes mount to the fullscreen overlay (not a stale global host), retries mount once after layout, and only shows the warning toast if both attempts fail. Mount reject reasons are logged for diagnosis.

Who is affected: private OVH server users opening PDFs via right-click → Open in PDF Viewer. SaaS is unchanged until you apply a platform release.
changeLog: Wait for fullscreen PDF host layout before mounting continuous viewer.
Scope PDF board host to fullscreen overlay during active session.
Retry mount after layout; defer false "no pages" toast.
Log mount reject reasons (no-root, not-viewer-workspace, etc.).
Fullscreen body CSS: height 100% for flex fill.
